en_title: Studio MDHR Announces 2 New Cuphead Games Are in Development
cn_title: 《茶杯头》开发商公布两款新作
subtitle: 双喜临门
opus_summary: Studio MDHR在夏日游戏节公布两款《茶杯头》新作：像素风《Mighty Cuphead Adventure》已放实机演示，手绘动画续作尚处早期开发。均未公布发售日和平台。

paragraphs.en: Studio MDHR made an appearance at Summer Game Fest 2026 with two big game reveals: and a new hand-animated Cuphead game.
paragraphs.cn: Studio MDHR 在2026年夏日游戏节上亮相，公布了两款重磅新作：一款像素风《茶杯头》游戏和一款全新的手绘动画《茶杯头》游戏。

paragraphs.en: Host Geoff Keighley introduced the new titles before handing the stage to the independent game developer. In typical MDHR fashion, it used a puppet show for the grand reveal, showing off gameplay footage for its pixelated Mighty Cuphead Adventure game, while promising that a hand-drawn Cuphead follow-up is also in early development.
paragraphs.cn: 主持人 Geoff Keighley 介绍了这些新作，随后将舞台交给这家独立游戏开发商。MDHR 以一贯的风格，用一场木偶戏完成了盛大揭晓，展示了像素风游戏《Mighty Cuphead Adventure》的实机画面，同时承诺一款手绘《茶杯头》续作也正处于早期开发阶段。

paragraphs.en: The hand-animated Cuphead game sounds almost like a proper sequel to Studio MDHR's tough-as-nails original platformer from 2017, though the team isn't quite ready to show what it looks like yet. Mighty Cuphead Adventure, however, seems to be further along, and you can see first gameplay for it below.
paragraphs.cn: 这款手绘动画《茶杯头》游戏听起来几乎像是 Studio MDHR 2017年那款难度极高的原版平台游戏的真正续作，不过团队尚未准备好展示其具体样貌。而《Mighty Cuphead Adventure》似乎开发进度更快，下方可以看到它的首批实机画面。

paragraphs.en: Where the original Cuphead sucked in players with its commitment to visuals inspired by old-school cartoons, Mighty Cuphead Adventure looks like a more retro-inspired experience. In its first trailer, we can see both Cuphead and Mugman channel the look and feel of 8-bit arcade-style video games.
paragraphs.cn: 原版《茶杯头》凭借对老式卡通视觉风格的执着吸引了玩家，而《Mighty Cuphead Adventure》则更像是一种复古风格体验。在首支预告片中，我们可以看到茶杯头和马克杯人展现出8位街机风格游戏的外观和感觉。

paragraphs.en: While the next mainline Cuphead game seems to be a ways off, MDHR wasn't quite ready to announce a release date for its Mighty Cuphead Adventure either. Its trailer also refrained from sharing platforms, only telling fans to expect support on "modern consoles" and "personal computers."
paragraphs.cn: 虽然下一款正统《茶杯头》游戏似乎还有一段距离，但 MDHR 也尚未准备好公布《Mighty Cuphead Adventure》的发售日期。其预告片同样未透露平台信息，只告诉粉丝们可以期待登陆「现代主机」和「个人电脑」。

paragraphs.en: Studio MDHR's two new Cuphead games helped kick off tonight's show. For all of the biggest highlights from the show, you can see everything announced at Summer Game Fest 2026 .
paragraphs.cn: Studio MDHR 的两款《茶杯头》新作为今晚的展会拉开了序幕。关于展会所有最精彩的亮点，你可以查看2026年夏日游戏节公布的全部内容。
